data.biography: Фиона Шоу родилась 10 июля 1958 года в графстве Корк, Ирландия. Она училась в средней школе в Схолье Мхуар в Корк-Сити, а затем получила диплом в Университетском колледже Корка. Она обучалась в Королевской академии драматического искусства (RADA) в Лондоне и была частью контингента актеров, которые вышли из колледжа, которые считались «новой волной». В то время как Фиона в первую очередь является продуктом сцены, она работала многократно перед камерой с выступлениями в «Моя левая нога: история Кристи Брауна» (1989), Гарри Поттер и философский камень (2001), Гарри Поттер и тайная Комната (2002), Гарри Поттер и узник Азкабана (2004), Гарри Поттер и орден Феникса (2007), Гарри Поттер и Дары смерти: Часть I (2010), Черерная орхидея (2006) и HBO's Настоящая кровь (2008).
data.name: Фиона Шоу

data.biography:
Fiona Shaw (geboren als Fiona Mary Wilson am 10. Juli 1958) ist eine irische Film- und Theaterschauspielerin. Sie arbeitete umfangreich mit der Royal Shakespeare Company und dem National Theatre sowie im Film und Fernsehen. Im Jahr 2020 wurde sie auf Platz 29 der Liste der größten irischen Filmschauspieler von The Irish Times geführt. 2001 wurde sie von Königin Elizabeth II. zum Ehrenkommandeur des Order of the British Empire (CBE) ernannt.

Sie gewann sowohl 1990 als auch 1994 den Laurence Olivier Award als beste Schauspielerin für ihre Rollen in den Stücken Electra, Wie es euch gefällt, Der gute Mensch von Sezuan (1990) und Machinal (1994) und erhielt weitere drei Olivier-Nominierungen für ihre Rollen in Mephisto (1986), Hedda Gabler (1992) und Happy Days (2008). Ihr Broadway-Debüt gab sie in der Titelrolle von Medea (2002), wofür sie eine Nominierung für den Tony Award als beste Schauspielerin in einem Theaterstück erhielt. 2013 kehrte sie mit dem Stück The Testament of Mary von Colm Tóibín an den Broadway zurück.

Im Film spielte sie Petunia Dursley in der Harry-Potter-Filmreihe (2001–2010). Weitere bemerkenswerte Filmrollen hatte sie in My Left Foot (1989), Persuasion (1995), Jane Eyre (1996), The Tree of Life (2011), Colette (2018), Ammonite (2020) und Enola Holmes (2020).

Zu ihren Fernsehrollen zählen Hedda Hopper im HBO-Film RKO 281 (1999) und Marnie Stonebrook in der HBO-Serie True Blood (2011). Sie spielte Carolyn Martens in der BBC-Serie Killing Eve (2018–22), wofür sie 2019 den BAFTA TV Award als beste Nebendarstellerin erhielt und zwei Primetime Emmy-Nominierungen bekam. Für ihre Rolle als Beraterin in Fleabag (2019) wurde sie für einen Primetime Emmy Award als herausragende Gastdarstellerin in einer Comedyserie nominiert. Sie spielte in der BBC-One-Serie Baptiste (2021) und in der Disney+-Serie Andor (2022) mit.

Fiona Shaw przyszła na świat 10 lipca 1958 roku w County Cork. Od dziecka chciała zostać aktorką. W 1985 roku ukończyła uniwersytet w Corku gdzie studiowała psychologię. Na wielkim ekranie debiutowała rolą zakonnicy w dramacie "Święte serca". Na kolejną rolę musiała czekać 4 lata. W tym czasie występowała w londyńskim teatrze. za rolę w sztuce "Jak wam się podoba" otrzymała nagrodę im. Laurence'a Oliviera. Uznanie krytyki przyniosła jej rola w obsypanym nagrodami dramacie "Moja lewa stopa". Popularność zdobyła dopiero po roli okrutnej Leny w ekranizacji gry "Super Mario Bros.". W 1993 roku ponownie otrzymała nagrodę im. Laurence'a Oliviera tym razem za rolę w "Machinal". Polscy widzowie pamiętają ją z melodramatu "Anna Karenina", komedii "Chłopak rzeźnika" oraz kinowej wersji słynnego serialu z lat 60 "Rewolwer i melonik". W 2001 roku Tirnity College przyznał jej doktorat honoris causa, zaś francuski rząd nadał jej tytuł Officer des Artes et des Lettres. Największą sławę przyniosła jej rola Petunii Dursley w filmie "Harry Potter i Kamień Filozoficzny". W 2003 roku nagrodzono ją tytułem CBE.

Fiona Shaw, Honorary CBE (née le 10 juillet 1958) est une actrice et directrice de théâtre irlandaise. Bien qu'elle soit probablement plus connue du public international pour son rôle mineur de Pétunia Dursley dans les films Harry Potter, elle est une actrice classique accomplie. Shaw a reçu un CBE honoraire en 2001.

菲奥娜·肖（Fiona Shaw，1958年7月10日出生于菲奥娜·玛丽·威尔逊）是爱尔兰电影和戏剧女演员。她因在《哈利波特》系列电影（2001-2010 年）中饰演佩妮·德思礼、在 HBO 系列《真爱如血》（2011 年）第四季中饰演玛妮·斯通布鲁克和在 BBC 系列《杀死伊芙》（2018-22 年）中饰演卡罗琳·马滕斯而闻名。

凭借在《杀死伊芙》中的表演，肖获得了 2019 年英国电影学院奖电视奖最佳女配角奖。凭借在《杀死伊芙》和《跳蚤袋》第二季中的表演，她分别获得了黄金时段艾美奖剧情类剧集杰出女配角和喜剧类剧集杰出客串女演员提名。在《杀死伊芙》第三季中，她再次获得剧情类剧集最佳女配角提名。

邵逸夫曾与皇家莎士比亚剧团和国家剧院广泛合作。她凭借各种角色获得了 1990 年奥利弗奖最佳女主角奖，包括 Electra、1994 年奥利维尔奖最佳女主角奖 Machinal 和 1997 年 Drama Desk 奖杰出个人表演奖 荒原.她的其他舞台作品包括在伦敦西区和百老汇的《美狄亚》中扮演主角（2001-2002）。她于2001年被授予荣誉大英帝国勋章。2020 年，她在《爱尔兰时报》爱尔兰最伟大的电影演员名单中排名第 29 位。
data.name: 菲奥娜·肖

data.biography:
菲奧娜·蕭（費歐娜·蕭，1958 年 7 月 10 日出生於菲奧娜·瑪麗·威爾遜）是愛爾蘭電影和戲劇女演員。她因在《哈利波特》系列電影（2001 - 2010 年）中飾演佩妮·德思禮、在 HBO 系列《真愛如血》（2011 年）第四季中飾演瑪妮·斯通布魯克和在 BBC 系列《殺死伊芙》（2018 - 22 年）中飾演卡羅琳·馬滕斯而聞名。

憑藉在《殺死伊芙》中的表演，蕭獲得了 2019 年英國電影學院獎電視獎最佳女配角獎。憑藉在《殺死伊芙》和《跳蚤袋》第二季中的表演，她分別獲得了黃金時段艾美獎劇情類劇集傑出女配角和喜劇類劇集傑出客串女演員提名。在《殺死伊芙》第三季中，她再次獲得劇情類劇集最佳女配角提名。

邵逸夫曾與皇家莎士比亞劇團和國家劇院廣泛合作。她憑藉各種角色獲得了 1990 年奧利弗獎最佳女主角獎，包括 Electra、1994 年奧利維爾獎最佳女主角獎 Machinal 和 1997 年 Drama Desk 獎傑出個人表演獎 荒原. 她的其他舞台作品包括在倫敦西區和百老匯的《美狄亞》中扮演主角（2001 - 2002）。她於 2001 年被授豫榮譽大英帝國勳章。2020 年，她在《愛爾蘭時報》愛爾蘭最偉大的電影演員名單中排名第 29 位。
data.name: 費歐娜·蕭

data.biography:
Kristen Jaymes Stewart (born April 9, 1990) is an American actress and filmmaker. The world's highest-paid actress in 2012, she has received various accolades, including a British Academy Film Award and a César Award, in addition to nominations for an Academy Award and a Golden Globe Award.

Born and raised in Los Angeles, Stewart first gained notice at age 12 for her role as the daughter of Jodie Foster's character in David Fincher's thriller Panic Room (2002), which earned her a Young Artist Award nomination. She subsequently starred in Speak (2004), Catch That Kid (2004), Zathura: A Space Adventure (2005), and Into the Wild (2007). She went on to achieve global stardom for her role as Bella Swan in The Twilight Saga film series (2008–2012), which ranks among the highest-grossing film franchises; for the role, she was awarded the BAFTA Rising Star Award in 2010.

After starring in the fantasy film Snow White and the Huntsman (2012), Stewart eschewed roles in big-budget films in favor of independent productions in the years following. She took on roles in the dramas Camp X-Ray (2014) and Still Alice (2014), and the science fiction romance Equals (2016). In 2015, she garnered critical acclaim for her performance in Olivier Assayas' drama film Clouds of Sils Maria, which won her the César Award for Best Supporting Actress. Stewart reunited with Assayas the following year in the supernatural thriller Personal Shopper (2016) and made her directorial debut with the short film Come Swim (2017). She returned to mainstream Hollywood with leading roles in the action film Charlie's Angels (2019) and the romantic comedy film Happiest Season (2020). Stewart's portrayal of Diana, Princess of Wales in Pablo Larraín's biographical drama Spencer (2021) earned her widespread critical acclaim and a nomination for the Academy Award for Best Actress.
data.name: Kristen Stewart

data.biography:
Kristen Stewart, née le 9 avril 1990 à Los Angeles, est une actrice américaine.

Révélée dans Panic Room, elle a surtout connu une notoriété mondiale avec le rôle de Bella Swan qu'elle a tenu dans les adaptations cinématographiques de la série Twilight.

En 2015, elle devient la première comédienne américaine à être nommée aux César et, à cette occasion, la première à en recevoir un (hors César d'honneur), celui de la meilleure actrice dans un second rôle pour Sils Maria.

Kristen Jaymes Stewart (* 9. April 1990 in Los Angeles, Kalifornien) ist eine US-amerikanische Filmschauspielerin.

Ihre erste größere Rolle spielte Stewart in The Safety of Objects (2001). Auf sich aufmerksam machte sie in dem Film Panic Room (2002), in dem sie die zuckerkranke Tochter Sarah von Meg Altmann (Jodie Foster) spielte. Des Weiteren spielte sie in dem Thriller Cold Creek Manor (2003) die Tochter von Dennis Quaid und Sharon Stone. Im US-Remake des dänischen Kinderfilms Kletter-Ida, Mission: Possible (2004), hatte Stewart eine der Hauptrollen. Im Alter von 13 Jahren übernahm sie in Speak – Die Wahrheit ändert alles (2004) die Rolle einer Highschool-Schülerin.

Im Jahr 2005 spielte Stewart in Fierce People neben Diane Lane und Donald Sutherland sowie in dem Fantasie-Abenteuer-Film Zathura. 2006 übernahm Stewart die Rolle des Teenagers Lucy Hardwicke in dem romantischen Drama Im Land der Frauen mit Meg Ryan und O.C., California-Star Adam Brody. 2008 spielte Stewart in dem Drama The Cake Eaters die 15-jährige, schwer kranke Georgia und an der Seite von William Hurt und Maria Bello in der Neuverfilmung des Dramas Das gelbe Segel die Rolle der Martine. data.biography:
קריסטן ג'יימס סטיוארט (באנגלית: Kristen Jaymes Stewart; נולדה ב-9 באפריל 1990) היא שחקנית ויוצרת קולנוע אמריקאית. השחקנית בעלת השכר הגבוה ביותר בעולם בשנת 2012, זכתה לשבחים שונים, כולל פרס האקדמיה הבריטית ופרס סזאר, בנוסף למועמדויות לפרס אוסקר ולפרס גלובוס הזהב.

סטיוארט, שנולדה וגדלה בלוס אנג'לס, זכתה להכרה לראשונה בגיל 12 על תפקידה כבתה של דמותה של ג'ודי פוסטר במותחן Panic Room של דיוויד פינצ'ר (2002), שזיכה אותה במועמדות לפרס האמן הצעיר. לאחר מכן היא שיחקה בסרטים Speak (2004), Catch That Kid (2004), Zathura: A Space Adventure (2005), ו-Into the Wild (2007). היא השיגה מעמד של כוכבת עולמית על תפקידה כבלה סוואן בסדרת סרטי סאגת הדמדומים (2008–2012), המדורגת בין זכייניות הסרטים המרוויחות ביותר; עבור התפקיד, היא זכתה בפרס הכוכב העולה של BAFTA בשנת 2010.

לאחר שכיכב בסרט הפנטזיה שלגיה והצייד (2012), סטיוארט נמנע מתפקידים בסרטים בעלי תקציב גדול לטובת הפקות עצמאיות בשנים שלאחר מכן. היא לקחה על עצמה תפקידים בדרמות Camp X-Ray (2014) ו- Still Alice (2014), וברומנטיקה המדע הבדיוני שווה (2016). ב-2015 היא זכתה לשבחי המבקרים על הופעתה בסרט הדרמה של אוליבייה אסיאס, עננים של סילס מריה, שזיכה אותה בפרס סזאר לשחקנית המשנה הטובה ביותר. סטיוארט התאחדה עם אסיאס בשנה שלאחר מכן במותחן העל טבעי Personal Shopper (2016) ועשתה את הופעת הבכורה שלה בבימוי עם הסרט הקצר "בוא לשחות" (2017). היא חזרה למיינסטרים הוליווד עם תפקידים ראשיים בסרט האקשן "המלאכים של צ'רלי" (2019) ובסרט הקומדיה הרומנטית "העונה המאושרת" (2020). גילום של סטיוארט של דיאנה, הנסיכה מוויילס בדרמה הביוגרפית של פבלו לארן ספנסר (2021) זיכה אותה בשבחי המבקרים הנרחבים ובמועמדות לפרס האוסקר לשחקנית הטובה ביותר.
data.name: קריסטן סטיוארט

data.biography:
Kristen Jaymes Stewart 1990. április 9-én született Los Angelesben, az Egyesült Államokban. Ausztrál származású édesanyja és édesapja a filmiparban dolgozik, így lányuk már korán a színészet világában találta magát. Kristennek egy bátyja van, Cameron, és két örökbefogadott öccse, Dana és Taylor.

Kristenre alig 8 éves korában egy tehetségkutató figyelt fel egy iskolai színdarabban, ezt követően pedig számos kisebb szerepben tűnt fel a televíziók képernyőin. Első jelentős szerepét a Birtokviszonyban (2001) kapta, melyet a Pánikszoba (2002) követett. Utóbbiban Jodie Foster lányát alakította.

A Jéghideg otthon (2003) című filmben Dennis Quaid és Sharon Stone játszották a szüleit, majd feltűnt a Beszélj! (2004), a Kegyetlen faj (2005) és a A hírnök (2007) című filmekben is, mielőtt szerepet kapott volna a Sean Penn rendezésében nagy sikert aratott Út a vadonba (2007) című drámában.

Zajos sikert és valódi rajongást a következő filmje hozott, amikor 2008-ban, 17 évesen megkapta a Stephanie Meyer nemzetközi bestselleréből forgatott film, az Alkonyat (2008) női főszerepét. Robert Pattinsonnal jól működő párost alkottak filmvásznon, és a közönségsiker a franchise következő részekeivel rohamos léptékben növekedett (Alkonyat: Újhold – 2009, Alkonyat: Napfogyatkozás – 2010, Alkonyat: Hajnalhasadás - 1. rész – 2011, Alkonyat: Hajnalhasadás - 2. rész – 2012).

A kasszasikerek után Kristen inkább a független, kis költségvetésű munkák felé fordult, eljátszotta Joan Jettet The Runaways - A rocker csajok (2010) című életrajzi filmben, szerepelt a Mallory szerint a világ (2010), a Hófehér és a vadász (2012) és az Úton (2012) című filmekben is.

Robert Pattinsonnal való szakítása óta Stewart egyedül él, van háza Los Angelesben és Malibun.

Kristen Jaymes Stewart (9 de abril de 1990), conocida como Kristen Stewart, es una actriz y directora de cine estadounidense.

Saltó a la fama internacional por interpretar el papel de Bella Swan en la saga Crepúsculo.​ También es el "rostro" de la casa de moda parisina Chanel y de la marca española Balenciaga.

Comenzó su carrera en 1999 y saltó a la fama como la hija de Jodie Foster en la película de suspense de 2002, La habitación del pánico. Desde entonces, ha protagonizado una serie de películas, incluyendo Speak (2004), Zathura (2005), Hacia rutas salvajes (2007), Adventureland (2009), The Runaways (2010), Blancanieves y el cazador (2012), On the Road (2012), Camp X-Ray (2014), Siempre Alice (2014) , Equals (2015) y American Ultra (2015).

Fue clasificada como la actriz femenina con mayores ingresos en el Vanity Fair "Hollywood Top Earners List of 2010"", con una ganancia estimada de $ 28.5 millones de dólares. En 2012 se convirtió en la actriz mejor pagada y más rentable de Hollywood según la revista Forbes. También fue nombrada por la revista ‘Glamour’ como la mujer mejor vestida del planeta en el 2012. Ganó el premio Rising Star BAFTA en 2010, y se convirtió en la primera actriz estadounidense en ganar un Premio César, cuando ganó a mejor actriz de reparto en 2015 por su papel junto a Juliette Binoche en Clouds of Sils Maria (2014).

Kristen Jaymes Stewart (d. 9 Nisan 1990), ABD'li aktris ve yönetmen. Los Angeles'ta gösteri dünyasında çalışan bir ailenin çocuğu olarak dünyaya gelen Stewart, kariyerine 1999 yılında çocuk oyuncu olarak başladı. 2002'de Panic Room filminde Jodie Foster'ın kızını canlandırmasıyla dikkatleri çekti. Daha sonra Speak (2004), Catch That Kid (2004), Zathura: A Space Adventure (2005) ve Into the Wild (2007) filmlerinde rol aldı. 2008-12 yılları arasında dünya çapında 3,3 milyar doların üzerinde hasılat elde eden Alacakaranlık Efsanesi film serisinde Bella Swan rolüyle tanındı.

Stewart, yetişkin kariyeri boyunca Adventureland (2009), The Runaways (2010), Snow White and the Huntsman (2012), On the Road (2012), Camp X-Ray (2014), Still Alice (2014) ve Equals (2015) gibi çok çeşitli filmlerde rol aldı. 2015'te Clouds of Sils Maria filmindeki rolüyle büyük beğeni topladı ve en iyi yardımcı kadın oyuncu dalında César Ödülü'nü kazandı ve bunu yapan ilk Amerikalı kadın oyuncu oldu. Café Society (2016), Personal Shopper (2016), Seberg (2019), Charlie's Angels (2019) ve Underwater (2020) filmlerinde rol aldı.

Kristen Stewart urodziła się i wychowała w Los Angeles, w Kalifornii. Jej ojciec - John Stewart jest managerem i producentem telewizyjnym, który pracuje dla wytwórni Fox. Jej matka - Jules Mann-Stewart jest scenarzystką pochodzenia australijskiego. Kristen uczęszczała do szkoły do siódmej klasy, potem kontynuowała naukę korespondencyjnie. Ma starszego rodzonego brata Camerona i dwóch adoptowanych Dana i Taylora.  Karierę aktorską Stewart rozpoczęła w wieku ośmiu lat, po tym jak agent zobaczył jej występ na święta w podstawówce. Jej pierwszą rolą był krótki, niemówiony występ w produkcji Disney Channel - "The Thirteenth Year". Wystąpiła w niezależnym filmie "The Safety of Objects", gdzie zagrała chłopczycę, córkę kłopotliwej, samotnej matki (w tej roli Patricia Clarkson). Stewart dostała rolę w znaczącym hollywoodzkim filmie "Azyl" - ponurej, diabetycznej córki rozwódki (w tej roli Jodie Foster). Podczas gdy film otrzymał różne recenzje, rola Kristen została doceniona.  Po sukcesie jaki odniósł "Azyl" Stewart zaproponowano rolę w innym thrillerze - "Cold Creek Manor", gdzie zagrała obok Dennisa Quaida i Sharon Stone. Film ogólnie przyniósł duże straty. Pierwszą główną rolą Stewart był występ w komedii akcji dla dzieci "Catch that Kid", obok Maxa Thieriota i Corbina Bleu'a. Stewart zagrała również rolę Lili w thrillerze "Undertow". Najgorszą rolą Stewart według krytyków był występ w filmie "Speak", opartym na powieści Laurie Halse Anderson. Stewart, wtedy w wieku trzynastu lat, grała uczennicę liceum, która zaprzestaje wszelkich kontaktów towarzyskich, po tym jak została zgwałcona. Jej gra aktorska spotkała się z wielkim uznaniem. W roku 2005 Kristen pojawiła się w filmie fantasy - "Zathura", w roli Lisy - nieodpowiedzialnej starszej siostry dwóch małych chłopców, którzy zmienili ich dom w pojazd kosmiczny. Film zebrał pochwały krytyków, jednak rola Stewart nie została specjalnie zauważona. Zagrała również w filmach takich jak "Fierce People" czy "Posłańcy". W 2007 roku zagrała nastolatkę Lucy Hardwicke w "In the Land of Women", dramacie romantycznym z Meg Ryan i Adamem Brodym. Zarówno film, jak i występ Stewart otrzymały różne recenzje. Tego samego roku aktorka zagrała w adaptacji "Into the Wild" Seana Penna. Za jej rolę, Tracy - nastoletniej piosenkarki, która zakochała się w młodym poszukiwaczu przygód Christopherze McCandless'ie otrzymała głównie pochwalne recenzje. Po tym filmie Stewart pojawiła się gościnnie w filmie "Jumper" i "What just happened", którego premiera miała miejsce w październiku 2008 roku.  16 listopada 2008 roku Summit Entertainment ogłosiło, że Stewart zagra Isabellę Swan w filmie "Zmierzch", opartym na powieści Stephenie Meyer, bestsellerowym romansie między wampirem a człowiekiem. Każda filmowa adaptacja sagi "Zmierzch" przyniosła aktorce podczas festiwali liczne nagrody.

Крістен Стюарт — американська акторка.

Виросла в сім’ї працівників кіно: її батько Джон Стюарт — менеджер та телевізійний продюсер компанії Fox; її мати, за походженням австралійка, Джулз Стюарт — сценарист. Дівчина відвідувала школу до сьомого класу, а потім її перевели на домашнє навчання. Свій диплом отримала на зйомках фільму «Сутінки. Сага. Затемнення», разом зі своєю героїнею Беллою. У неї є рідний старший брат, Камерон Стюарт, а також два прийомних брати — Дана та Тейлор.

Перший акторський досвід Крістен — у восьмирічному віці вона привернула увагу кіноагента на Різдвяній постановці початкової школи. Перша коротка поява Крістен на телебаченні — на телеканалі «Disney Channel» у фільмі «Тринадцятий рік». Відтак з’явилася в незалежній стрічці «Безпека предметів», зігравши доньку одинокої матері (Патрісія Клаксон); згодом зіграла доньку-діабетика розлученої матері (Джоді Фостер) у «Кімната паніки». На останній фільм було чимало схвальних відгуків, а юну акторку помічено великими кінокомпаніями.

data.biography: Kristen Jaymes Stewart (Los Angeles, 9 de abril de 1990) é uma atriz e diretora de cinema americana. Nascida em Los Angeles, filha de pais que trabalharam no show business, Stewart começou sua carreira como atriz infantil em 1999. Ela ganhou notoriedade em 2002 por interpretar a filha de Jodie Foster no thriller Panic Room. Posteriormente, ela estrelou Speak (2004), Catch That Kid (2004), Zathura: A Space Adventure (2005) e Into the Wild (2007). Ela recebeu amplo reconhecimento por interpretar Bella Swan na série de filmes The Twilight Saga (2008-12), que coletivamente arrecadou mais de $ 3,3 bilhões em todo o mundo.

data.biography:
Anders Matthesen (født 6. juli 1975 på Østerbro, København), også kendt under kunstnernavnet Anden, er en dansk stand-up komiker, skuespiller, rapper, sangskriver, manuskriptforfatter, forfatter, tegnefilmsdubber og filminstruktør. Matthesen er opvokset i Albertslund, og han refererer ofte til bydelen i sin standup og bruger den i sin humor.

Anders Matthesen er skuespiller, rapstjerne, manuskriptforfatter og tv-vært, men først og fremmest stand-up-komiker. "Anden", der voksede op i Albertslund, startede sin karriere i 1993 og har siden optrådt overalt i Danmark på diverse klubber. Han fik sit gennembrud som stand-up-komiker og slog sit navn fast igennem en række one-man-shows bl.a. "Fra ende til Anden", "Hva' Snakker Du Om", "Tal for dig selv" og showet "Anden på Coke", der af anmelderne blev rost til skyerne. Den 1. august 2008 har han på Gasværket i København premiere på det nyeste show. Han stod bag julekalenderen "Jul på Vesterbro", hvor han skrev og spillede alle roller samt den prisbelønnede animationsfilm "Terkel i Knibe". I 2004 fik Anders Matthesen sin skuespillerdebut i rollen som Simon Spies i "Simon" på Østre Gasværk og i 2006 havde han sin filmdebut med hovedrollen i filmen "Rene Hjerter". I 2009 spiller han hovedrollen i en film som han selv har skrevet og instrueret med titlen "Sorte kugler". Anders Matthesen har desuden startet et bookingbureau Duckpower Comedy, der dels tager hånd om hans egen karriere, dels hjælper især unge komikere på vej. I tegnefilmen "Olsen-banden på de bonede gulve" er han krediteret som Albert S. Lund. Han danner privat par med Cemille Rosenberg.
data.name: Anders Matthesen

data.biography:
Bo Rose Maerten (The Hague, October 10, 1992) is a Dutch actress and the daughter of Belgian actor Hugo Maerten.

She is best known for her leading role in the film Timboektoe based on the book of the same name by Carry Slee. From December 2008 to May 2010, she also starred in the series ONM. In it she played the role of Kim Klein.

Maerten attended the Interconfessional Makeblijde College in Rijswijk and then the Segbroek College in The Hague where she obtained her vwo diploma in 2010. She then went on to study at the Toneelacademie Maastricht. Later she studied at the Erasmus University in Rotterdam.

In 2013, she starred in the television series Feuten and Van God los, and had a role in the feature film Wolf. In 2014 and 2015 she starred in Celblok H[2] and had several guest roles, such as in Meiden van de Herengracht and Heer & Meester. In addition, she played Barbara Loonhuizen in the series Tessa. To end the year, she played the role of Belle in the motion picture Mannenharten 2. In 2016, she starred in the horror film Arrêt Pipi. In 2017, the film Ron Goossens, Low Budget Stuntman was released,[3] in which Maerten plays an exaggerated version of herself.
data.name: Bo Maerten

data.biography:
Simon Phillip Hugh Callow CBE (born 15 June 1949) is an English actor. Known as a character actor on stage and screen, he has received numerous accolades including an Olivier Award and Screen Actors Guild Award as well as nominations for two BAFTA Awards. He was made a Commander of the Order of the British Empire (CBE) for his services to acting by Queen Elizabeth II in 1999.

Callow rose to prominence originating the title role of Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart in the 1979 Peter Shaffer play Amadeus, for which he received a Laurence Olivier Award for Best Actor in a Supporting Role nomination. Callow joined the Miloš Forman 1984 film adaptation, this time portraying Emanuel Schikaneder. In 1992, Callow won the Laurence Olivier Award for Best Director of a Musical for Carmen Jones. As an actor, he won acclaim for his comedic roles in A Room with a View (1985) and Four Weddings and a Funeral (1994) earning a BAFTA Award for Best Actor in a Supporting Role nomination for each. Other notable roles include in Maurice (1987), Howards End (1992), Shakespeare in Love (1998), and The Phantom of the Opera (2004).

His television roles include Tom Chance in the Channel 4 series Chance in a Million (1984) and The Duke of Sandringham in the series Outlander from 2014 to 2016. He portrayed Napoleon in The Man of Destiny (1981), and Charles Dickens in numerous television projects. He has also appeared on numerous shows such as Midsomer Murders, Rome, Angels in America, Doctor Who, Galavant, Hawkeye, and The Witcher.

Callow was born on 15 June 1949 in Streatham, South London, the son of Yvonne Mary (née Guise), a secretary and Neil Francis Callow, a businessman. His father was of French descent and his mother was of Danish and German ancestry. His father left when Simon was 18 months old, and he was brought up by his mother and grandmothers. He and his mother travelled to Northern Rhodesia (now called Zambia) when he was nine to try and reconcile with his father. This did not happen and Callow was sent for three years to boarding school in South Africa. He and his mother returned to Britain when he was twelve. He was raised as a Catholic. Callow was a student at the London Oratory School in West Brompton, and then went on to study briefly at Queen's University Belfast in Northern Ireland, where he was active in the gay liberation movement.[5] He gave up his degree course after a year to take a three-year acting course at the Drama Centre London.

He made his first film appearance in 1984 as Schikaneder in Amadeus. The following year, he appeared as the Reverend Mr Beebe in A Room with a View. His first television role was in the Carry On Laughing episode "Orgy and Bess" in 1975, but it was cut from the final print. He starred in several series of the Channel 4 situation comedy Chance in a Million, as Tom Chance, an eccentric individual to whom coincidences happened regularly. Roles like this and his part in Four Weddings and a Funeral brought him to a wider audience. Callow portrayed Pliny the Elder in CBBC's 2007 children's drama series, Roman Mysteries in the episode "The Secrets of Vesuvius". He played Armand Duquesne in Marvel's Hawkeye on Disney+.
data.name: Simon Callow

data.biography: Actor, autor y director inglés nacido en Londres. Delicioso actor de carácter que llamó la atención en 1979 actuando en el rol de Mozart inmaduro en la producción teatral Amadeus, de Peter Shaffer y apareció como el empresario de ópera Emanuel Schikaneder en la versión fílmica de Milos Forman, Amadeus (1984). Posteriormente dio vida a una gran cantidad de personajes, en su mayoría cómicos, principalmente en películas basadas en novelas de E. M. Forster, Una habitación con vistas (1985) como un reverendo y Maurice (1987) como un director de escuela. Ya establecido como director de teatro, televisión y ópera, dirigió su primer film para el equipo Merchant-Ivory, La balada del Sad Café (1991). También es autor de varios libros, como Siendo un actor (1984) y Charles Laughton: Un actor difícil (1988).

data.biography:
1971年1月11日，Mary J. Blige出生在美国纽约最北部的布朗克斯区，但是她早年的时光确是在佐治亚州的港口城市萨凡纳度过的，后来她和母亲、姐姐一起搬到了纽约东南部的杨克斯，5岁便遭到性侵害的她，童年带给她的只有创伤。不久她从高中辍学，和她的母亲一起打点理发室。16岁时，有一次她在纽约White Plains的一家卡拉OK演唱Anita Baker的“Caught Up in the Rapture”，并录制成了磁带，她的声音把Uptown Records唱片公司的总裁Andre Harrell吸引住了，很快她就得到了该公司的合同，但开始她只是在公司做些幕后工作，比如给大牌歌手做背景和声等。直到1992年，她得到了吹牛老爹Sean "Puffy" Combs的协助，在他的制作下，Mary J. Blige的第一张个人唱片《What's the 411?》终于正式发行，很快这张专辑便成为了Billboard R&B专辑榜的冠军，单曲“Real Love”和“You Remind Me”等分别成为了冠军单曲。这张专辑也是Mary J. Blige最受评论界好评的专辑之一，在这张专辑中，Mary J. Blige凭借着自己出色的声线谐和的把R&B音乐和说唱音乐结合在了一起，被称为是新的Aretha Franklin。

　　能够把R&B音乐和说唱音乐自然结合在一起，她是女歌手中有史以来的第一人。尽管身为一名黑人歌手，但她的金发和碧眼依然吸引了众人的目光，同时她又带有黑人天生的倔强和强硬，加上童年生活的一些创伤带了的暴躁，这使他变得更具有自己独特的魅力。1994年，还是在Sean "Puffy" Combs的帮助下Mary J. Blige发行了第二张专辑《My Life》，在专辑中Mary J. Blige讲述了她曲折的童年生活，但是在这张专辑以后，Mary J. Blige和Uptown Records唱片公司以及Sean "Puffy" Combs的关系开始变得紧张，最终她和MCA唱片公司签约。

　　1997年，Mary J. Blige结束了与R&B男子团体Jodeci成员K-Ci长达六年的恋情，同时她发行了第三张专辑《Share My World》，尽管评论界说她失去了那种风格融合的特点，使专辑变得平庸，但是专辑的高销量的势头还是不可低档。在这期间，Mary J. Blige的形象开始渐渐转变，她开始慢慢的摒弃一些自身的坏毛病，诸如懒散和暴力倾向等，到了1999年，她的第四张专辑《Mary》开始变得和以往不同，越发的成熟路线，无论是音乐和服饰，都体现出了她真正成熟、大气的特点。随后的专辑越来越能体现出她自身的特点，2001年的《No More Drama》和当初第一张专辑《What's the 411?》相比简直有天壤之别，更多的自主创作，让专辑更像是Mary J. Blige的个人专辑。2002年，Mary J. Blige又发行了专辑《Dance for Me》，专辑的制作人由西岸说唱大佬Dr. Dre担纲。2003年，第七张个人专辑《Love & Life》与歌迷见面。

　　Mary J. Blige的专辑中有五张成为冠军专辑，数十首顶尖单曲，并且曾经在1996年凭借歌曲“I'll Be There For You/You're All I Need To Get By”和Method Man一起获得了第38届格莱美最佳说唱组合奖(Best Rap Performance By A Duo Or Group).

　　2005年岁末，Hip-Hop Soul天后Mary J. Blige发行了第7张个人专辑《The Breakthrough》。专辑在发行的第一周恰逢圣诞节，以72万7千张的高销量获得2005年度最后一周的Billboard 200专辑榜的冠军。单曲“Be Without You”在Top100第三，R&B榜15周冠军。与U2合作的“One”在英国拿到第二，并成为06年英国最畅销单曲NO.35。Mary出现在Busta Rhymes的“Touch It”混音中，化名Brook-Lynn。在唱片中大家可以看到Brook-Lynn的名字，在“Enough Cryin’”和“Gonna Breakthrough”两首歌中大玩了一会说唱。

　　这张唱片的销量和奖项使06年成为MJB年：美国3白金，世界7白金的销量。3项格莱美，9项BILLBOARD AWARD，2项全美音乐奖，世界音乐奖特别贡献奖（因为组委会得知她当天不能出席颁奖，把奖项取消了）

　　06年12月，精选《Reflections - A Retrospective》推出，专辑中出现四首新歌。至今销量1,675,000。

　　在2007年岁末，此时已经成为实力派R&B老将的Mary J.Blige推出了她个人的第8张录音室专辑《Growing Pains》，与上张大获成功的专辑《The Breakthrough》相隔了几乎整两年。在Billboard 200专辑榜中上榜第一周，《Growing Pains》凭借62万9千张的销量成绩获得了当周亚军的好成绩。去年是Mary J.Blige事业上大获成功的一年，《The Breakthrough》使她的个人音乐事业达到了顶峰。但作为一位出道已近20年的老将来说，Blige并没有长时间的享受那种所谓的“成功”，而是很快的投入到了下一张专辑的准备工作当中。在这张新作中，Mary J.Blige参与了其中大部分歌曲的创作。首支打榜单曲“Just Fine”已经在MTV、VH-1等各大电视台中成为热播单曲，而另一首打榜单曲“Work That”也成为苹果iPod的广告歌曲。

　　The Neptunes、Johnta Austin、Ne-Yo、Stargate、Bryan-Michael Cox、Tricky、Eric Hudson和Sean Garrett均在其中，而另两位大腕Ludacris与Usher还作为嘉宾在其中客串演唱。

　　MJB说：“唱片的标题灵感来自去年的奥斯卡宴会，著名的脱口秀主持Oprah Winfrey将她带到现场，著名影星梅丽尔斯特里普和妮可基德曼激动地与她拥抱合影，兴奋地说自己如何喜欢她。MARY自问"我值得拥有这些么？"Oprah说道:"因为你身上有她们喜欢的特质"于是，这张唱片的灵感来了：“这是一种成长的时刻.”

　　09年6月，一支与加拿大说唱歌手Drake合作的单曲“The One”发布，而她的新专辑《Stronger》也计划于2009年12月15日发行。而Mary J. Blige还将客串担任2010年《美国偶像》的评委。
data.name: 玛丽·布莱姬

data.biography: Мэри Джей Блайдж (полное имя Мэри Джейн Блайдж, англ. Mary Jane Blige; род. 11 января 1971) — американская певица в жанрах R&B, соул и хип-хоп, автор песен, музыкальный продюсер и актриса. Общее количество проданных ею альбомов в мире составляет примерно 50 миллионов копий. Широко известная своими зажигательными концертными номерами, она по состоянию на 2015 год 27 раз номинировалась на премию «Грэмми» и была удостоена девяти статуэток.

Mary Jane Blige (/blaɪʒ/; born January 11, 1971) is an American singer, songwriter, actress, and philanthropist. She started her career as a backing singer on Uptown Records in 1989. She has released 13 studio albums, eight of which have achieved multi-platinum worldwide sales. Blige has sold over 80 million records, has won nine Grammy Awards, four American Music Awards, twelve Billboard Music Awards and has also received three Golden Globe Award nominations, including one for her supporting role in the film Mudbound (2017) and another for its second original song "Mighty River" for Mudbound; she also received a nomination for the Academy Awards for Best Supporting Actress and Best Original Song, becoming the first person nominated for acting and songwriting in the same year.

In 1992, Blige released her first album, What's the 411?. Her 1994 album My Life is among Rolling Stone's 500 Greatest Albums of All Time,[4] and Time magazine's All-Time 100 Albums. She received a Legends Award at the World Music Awards in 2006, and the Voice of Music Award from ASCAP in 2007. As of 2018, Blige has sold 80 million records worldwide. Billboard ranked Blige as the most successful female R&B/Hip-Hop artist of the past 25 years. In 2017, Billboard magazine named her 2006 song "Be Without You" as the most successful R&B/Hip-Hop song of all time, as it spent an unparalleled 15 weeks atop the Hot R&B/Hip-Hop Songs chart and over 75 weeks on the chart. In 2011, VH1 ranked Blige as the 80th greatest artist of all time. ln 2012, VH1 ranked Blige at number 9 in "The 100 Greatest Women in Music" list.
data.name: Mary J. Blige

data.biography:
1971 年 1 月 11 日，瑪麗·布萊姬 出生在美國紐約最北部的布朗克斯區，但是她早年的時光確是在佐治亞州的港口城市薩凡納度過的，後來她和母親、姐姐一起搬到了紐約東南部的楊克斯，5 歲便遭到性侵害的她，童年帶給她的只有創傷。不久她從高中輟學，和她的母親一起打點理髮室。16 歲時，有一次她在紐約 White Plains 的一家卡拉 OK 演唱 Anita Baker 的“Caught Up in the Rapture”，並錄製成了磁帶，她的聲音把 Uptown Records 唱片公司的總裁 Andre Harrell 吸引住了，很快她就得到了該公司的合同，但開始她只是在公司做些幕後工作，比如給大牌歌手做背景和聲等。直到 1992 年，她得到了吹牛老爹 Sean "Puffy" Combs 的協助，在他的製作下，瑪麗·布萊姬 的第一張個人唱片《What's the 411? 》終於正式發行，很快這張專輯便成為了 Billboard R&B 專輯榜的冠軍，單曲“Real Love”和“You Remind Me”等分別成為了冠軍單曲。這張專輯也是 瑪麗·布萊姬 最受評論界好評的專輯之一，在這張專輯中，瑪麗·布萊姬 憑藉著自己出色的聲線諧和的把 R&B 音樂和説唱音樂結合在了一起，被稱為是新的 Aretha Franklin。

能夠把 R&B 音樂和説唱音樂自然結合在一起，她是女歌手中有史以來的第一人。儘管身為一名黑人歌手，但她的金髮和碧眼依然吸引了眾人的目光，同時她又帶有黑人天生的倔強和強硬，加上童年生活的一些創傷帶了的暴躁，這使他變得更具有自己獨特的魅力。1994 年，還是在 Sean "Puffy" Combs 的幫助下 瑪麗·布萊姬 發行了第二張專輯《My Life》，在專輯中 瑪麗·布萊姬 講述了她曲折的童年生活，但是在這張專輯以後，瑪麗·布萊姬 和 Uptown Records 唱片公司以及 Sean "Puffy" Combs 的關係開始變得緊張，最終她和 MCA 唱片公司簽約。

1997 年，瑪麗·布萊姬 結束了與 R&B 男子團體 Jodeci 成員 K - Ci 長達六年的戀情，同時她發行了第三張專輯《Share My World》，儘管評論界説她失去了那種風格融合的特點，使專輯變得平庸，但是專輯的高銷量的勢頭還是不可低檔。在這期間，瑪麗·布萊姬 的形象開始漸漸轉變，她開始慢慢的摒棄一些自身的壞毛病，諸如懶散和暴力傾向等，到了 1999 年，她的第四張專輯《Mary》開始變得和以往不同，越發的成熟路線，無論是音樂和服飾，都體現出了她真正成熟、大氣的特點。隨後的專輯越來越能體現出她自身的特點，2001 年的《No More Drama》和當初第一張專輯《What's the 411? 》相比簡直有天壤之別，更多的自主創作，讓專輯更像是 瑪麗·布萊姬 的個人專輯。2002 年，瑪麗·布萊姬 又發行了專輯《Dance for Me》，專輯的製作人由西岸説唱大佬 Dr.Dre 擔綱。2003 年，第七張個人專輯《Love & Life》與歌迷見面。

瑪麗·布萊姬 的專輯中有五張成為冠軍專輯，數十首頂尖單曲，並且曾經在 1996 年憑藉歌曲“I'll Be There For You/You're All I Need To Get By”和 Method Man 一起獲得了第 38 屆格萊美最佳説唱組合獎 (Best Rap Performance By A Duo Or Group). 2005 年歲末，Hip - Hop Soul 天後 瑪麗·布萊姬 發行了第 7 張個人專輯《The Breakthrough》。專輯在發行的第一週恰逢聖誕節，以 72 萬 7 千張的高銷量獲得 2005 年度最後一週的 Billboard 200 專輯榜的冠軍。單曲“Be Without You”在 Top100 第三，R&B 榜 15 周冠軍。與 U2 合作的“One”在英國拿到第二，併成為 06 年英國最暢銷單曲 NO. 35。Mary 出現在 Busta Rhymes 的“Touch It”混音中，化名 Brook - Lynn。在唱片中大家可以看到 Brook - Lynn 的名字，在“Enough Cryin’”和“Gonna Breakthrough”兩首歌中大玩了一會説唱。

這張唱片的銷量和獎項使 06 年成為 MJB 年：美國 3 白金，世界 7 白金的銷量。3 項格萊美，9 項 BILLBOARD AWARD，2 項全美音樂獎，世界音樂獎特別貢獻獎（因為組委會得知她當天不能出席頒獎，把獎項取消了） 06 年 12 月，精選《Reflections - A Retrospective》推出，專輯中出現四首新歌。至今銷量 1, 675, 000。

在 2007 年歲末，此時已經成為實力派 R&B 老將的 Mary J.Blige 推出了她個人的第 8 張錄音室專輯《Growing Pains》，與上張大獲成功的專輯《The Breakthrough》相隔了幾乎整兩年。在 Billboard 200 專輯榜中上榜第一週，《Growing Pains》憑藉 62 萬 9 千張的銷量成績獲得了當周亞軍的好成績。去年是 Mary J.Blige 事業上大獲成功的一年，《The Breakthrough》使她的個人音樂事業達到了頂峰。但作為一位出道已近 20 年的老將來説，Blige 並沒有長時間的享受那種所謂的“成功”，而是很快的投入到了下一張專輯的準備工作當中。在這張新作中，Mary J.Blige 參與了其中大部分歌曲的創作。首支打榜單曲“Just Fine”已經在 MTV、VH-1 等各大電視台中成為熱播單曲，而另一首打榜單曲“Work That”也成為蘋果 iPod 的廣告歌曲。

The Neptunes、Johnta Austin、Ne - Yo、Stargate、Bryan - Michael Cox、Tricky、Eric Hudson 和 Sean Garrett 均在其中，而另兩位大人物 Ludacris 與 Usher 還作為嘉賓在其中客串演唱。

MJB 説：“唱片的標題靈感來自去年的奧斯卡宴會，著名的棟篤笑主持 Oprah Winfrey 將她帶到現場，著名影星梅麗爾斯特里普和妮可基德曼激動地與她擁抱合影，興奮地説自己如何喜歡她。MARY 自問"我值得擁有這些麼？"Oprah 説道:"因為你身上有她們喜歡的特質"於是，這張唱片的靈感來了：“這是一種成長的時刻. ” 09 年 6 月，一支與加拿大説唱歌手 Drake 合作的單曲“The One”發佈，而她的新專輯《Stronger》也計劃於 2009 年 12 月 15 日發行。而 瑪麗·布萊姬 還將客串擔任 2010 年《美國偶像》的評委。
data.name: 瑪麗·布萊姬

data.biography: Hayley Catherine Rose Vivien Mills (born 18 April 1946) is an English actress. The daughter of Sir John Mills and Mary Hayley Bell, and younger sister of actress Juliet Mills, Mills began her acting career as a child and was hailed as a promising newcomer, winning the BAFTA Award for Most Promising Newcomer for her performance in the British crime drama film Tiger Bay (1959), the Academy Juvenile Award for Disney's Pollyanna (1960) and Golden Globe Award for New Star of the Year – Actress in 1961. During her early career, she appeared in six films for Walt Disney, including her dual role as twins Susan and Sharon in the Disney film The Parent Trap (1961). Her performance in Whistle Down the Wind (a 1961 adaptation of the novel written by her mother) saw Mills nominated for BAFTA Award for Best British Actress.
data.name: Hayley Mills

data.biography:
Hayley Catherine Rose Vivian Mills ist eine britische Schauspielerin und eine der berühmtesten Kinderdarstellerinnen der frühen 1960er Jahre.

Hayley Mills ist eine Tochter des Schauspielers Sir John Mills und der Schriftstellerin und ehemaligen Schauspielerin Mary Hayley Bell. Ihre ältere Schwester Juliet ist ebenfalls Schauspielerin, ihr Bruder Jonathan ist Regisseur.

Hayley Mills wuchs im Haus ihrer Eltern auf und war sehr aufgeweckt. Als sie ins Internat kam, wurde sie allerdings im Kreise von Gleichaltrigen recht schüchtern. Trost fand sie in den Theaterproduktionen ihrer Schule.

Mit zwölf wurde Mills von Regisseur J. Lee Thompson entdeckt, der für die Hauptrolle in Tiger Bay eigentlich einen Jungen suchte. Die Rolle erhielt aber, nachdem er sie im Hause Mills gesehen hatte, die Tochter eines seiner Darsteller. Der Film brachte Hayley einen Silbernen Bären, Sonderpreis für schauspielerische Leistung, bei der Berlinale 1959 ein.

Lillian Disney, Ehefrau von Walt Disney, war von Hayleys schauspielerischer Leistung mehr als begeistert, und so erhielt sie einen Fünf-Jahres-Vertrag für Disney-Filme. Der erste davon war der Klassiker Alle lieben Pollyanna, die Geschichte eines jungen Mädchens, das zu seiner Tante zieht. Für diesen Film erhielt Hayley Mills 1960 den letzten Juvenile Award, einen speziellen Oscar für herausragende Kinderdarsteller, der insgesamt nur zwölfmal verliehen wurde, sowie den Golden Globe Award als beste Nachwuchsdarstellerin.

In Die Vermählung ihrer Eltern geben bekannt (The Parent Trap, nach Motiven von Erich Kästners Das doppelte Lottchen) spielte sie die Doppelrolle des Zwillingspärchens, das nach langer Zeit seine Eltern wieder zusammenbringt. Andere Disney-Filme, in denen Hayley mitwirkte, waren u. a. Die Abenteuer des Kapitän Grant (In Search of the Castaways), Summer Magic und Alles für die Katz! (That Darn Cat!). 1998 erhielt Mills vom Konzern die begehrte Auszeichnung Disney-Legende.

Neben den Disney-Filmen gab es weitere Hauptrollen; hervorzuheben wären dabei …woher der Wind weht (Whistle Down the Wind, 1961, nach einem Roman ihrer Mutter), in dem sie eine 15-Jährige spielt, die einen Mörder für Jesus hält, und Das Haus im Kreidegarten (The Chalk Garden, 1964). Darin spielte sie ein 16-jähriges Mädchen, das in einer Fantasiewelt lebt und versucht, hinter das Geheimnis seiner neuen Hauslehrerin zu kommen.

1966 machte Mills mit dem Film Honigmond ’67 (The Family Way) Schlagzeilen, zum einen, weil sie in dem Streifen eine Nacktszene hatte, und zum anderen, weil sie eine Affäre mit ihrem Regisseur anfing. Er hieß Roy Boulting und war 33 Jahre älter als sie. Die beiden heirateten 1971, als sie 25 und er 58 Jahre alt war. Am 18. Januar 1973 bekamen die beiden Sohn Crispian; 1977 ließen sie sich scheiden. Crispian Mills wurde später ein bekannter Sänger und Gitarrist (siehe auch Kula Shaker). Hayley Mills’ zweiter Sohn, Jason Lawson, stammt aus der Beziehung mit dem britischen Schauspieler Leigh Lawson in den 1970er Jahren.

Außerdem war sie seither eher im Fernsehen als auf der Leinwand zu sehen, so unter anderem in Agatha-Christie-Verfilmungen und als Titelheldin der US-Mini-Fernsehserie Good Morning, Miss Bliss (kurzlebiger Vorgänger von Saved by the Bell), sowie in Nachfolgefilmen ihres 1961er Erfolges Die Vermählung ihrer Eltern geben bekannt für den Disney Channel.

Хейли Кэтрин Роуз Вивьен Миллс - британская актриса, дочь Джона Миллса и Мэри Хейли Белл, сестра Джульет Миллс, мать Криспиана Миллса. Актёрская карьера Хейли Миллс началась в детстве. В 13 лет известность ей принесла роль в фильме «Тигровая бухта», за которую она получила молодёжную премию BAFTA. В 1961 году роль девочки-сироты в диснеевском фильме «Поллианна» принесла Миллс огромную популярность в Америке и «Оскар» в номинации «Молодёжная награда». В том же году Миллс стала обладательницей «Золотого глобуса» в номинации «Новая звезда года». В 1960-е годы Миллс снялась в шести фильмах Walt Disney, все они имели успех в прокате. На этот период пришёлся пик карьеры Миллс - критики называли её самой любимой детской кинозвездой в Америке. Этот имидж, однако, помешал ей сыграть роли в таких, ставших легендарными лентах, как «Лолита» и «Мыс страха». После окончания контракта с Walt Disney, Миллс вернулась в Англию, где продолжила исполнять роли в кино. В конце 1960-х годов Миллс начала театральную карьеру, а с конца 1970-х стала регулярно сниматься в телевизионных фильмах. В 1980-е годы Миллс присоединилась к Международному обществу сознания Кришны, стала вегетарианкой и занималась пропагандой вегетарианства. В 1971-1977 годы Миллс была замужем за режиссёром Роем Боултингом. От этого брака у неё родился сын Криспиан.
data.name: Хейли Миллз

data.biography:
Hayley Catherine Rose Vivien Mills (n. Londres, Anglaterra; 18 d'abril de 1946) és una actriu britànica. Va aconseguir un gran èxit com a estrella infantil a Hollywood i el Regne Unit durant els anys 60, arribant a rebre un Oscar infantil per la seva actuació a Pollyanna.

Filla del famós actor guanyador d'un Óscar John Mills i de l'escriptora i guionista Marie Hayley Bell va aparèixer per primera vegada davant les càmeres el 1947, sent encara un nadó, a la pel·lícula So Well Remembered. Va debutar com a actriu el 1959, amb 13 anys, a La badia del tigre; la seva interpretació es va veure recompensada amb un premi al Festival de Berlín i el premi Bafta. A l'any següent va ser contractada per Walt Disney per protagonitzar una sèrie de comèdies de tall familiar, convertint-se així en una de les cares més populars del cinema dels seixanta. La primera va ser Pollyanna (1960), amb la qual es va fer molt popular i va rebre l'Òscar Juvenil, el Globus d'Or com a nova promesa, el premi Llorer i una nominació per als premis Bafta. El 1966, amb 20 anys, va acabar el seu contracte amb Disney i va seguir rodant petits melodrames, pel·lícules d'intriga i alguna comèdia amb diferents companyies i directors.

Allunyada dels mitjans durant anys, una de les seves rares aparicions en lliuraments de premis va ser el 2003, durant la 75a edició dels Premis Óscar formant part d'un homenatge als actors guanyadors de l'Òscar al llarg dels 75 anys d'existència d'aquest premi.

هایلی کاترین رز ویوین میلز (متولد 18 آوریل 1946) بازیگر انگلیسی است. دختر سر جان میلز و مری هایلی بل ، و خواهر کوچکتر بازیگر زن جولیت میلز ، میلز کار بازیگری خود را به عنوان یک کودک آغاز کرد و به عنوان یک تازه وارد امیدوار کننده مورد استقبال قرار گرفت و برنده جایزه BAFTA برای نویدبخش تازه وارد برای عملکرد خود در جنایت انگلیس شد. فیلم درام Tiger Bay (1959) ، جایزه نوجوانان آکادمی برای Pollyanna دیزنی (1960) و جایزه گلدن گلوب برای New Star of the Year - بازیگر زن در سال 1961. در دوران ابتدایی ، وی در شش فیلم برای والت دیزنی ، از جمله دوگانه خود ظاهر شد نقش به عنوان دوقلوهای سوزان و شارون در فیلم دیزنی The Parent Trap (1961). عملکرد او در Whistle Down the Wind (اقتباسی از رمان در سال 1961 که توسط مادرش نوشته شده بود) دیدم میلز نامزد دریافت جایزه BAFTA برای بهترین بازیگر زن انگلیسی شد./.

赵茜，1992年6月9日出生于内蒙古鄂尔多斯市，中国模特、演员 。

2010年，获得第35届国际比基尼小姐大赛中国冠军、全球亚军、慈善小姐、秋季女郎。2013年8月，在《变形金刚4》全球华人演员海选中同来自全球的7万多人角逐获得参演该片机会。2014年6月，与迈克尔·贝、李冰冰等一同亮相了《变形金刚4：绝迹重生》的全球首映礼，上海、香港和北京首映礼。同年参演克里斯·韦奇执导的好莱坞电影《怪兽卡车》。

2017年4月，在时尚悬疑偶像剧《归还世界给你》中饰演胡雯汐。11月，受邀出席“2017亚洲音乐盛典”，并担任主持。同年，在悬疑剧《暗黑者3》中饰演陆飘飘 。2018年6月，参演现实题材电视剧《风暴舞》。8月，出演王凯执导的电影《特勤精英》。9月，凭借电影《SIJI:DRIVER》获得蒙特利尔国际花环奖电影节“最佳女主角奖” 。
data.name: 赵茜

data.biography:
Zhao Qian (nome em inglês: Candice) é uma atriz e modelo chinesa, nascida em Ordos, na Mongólia Interior. Ela se formou na Universidade Politécnica de Tianjin. Com sua alta e aptidão atlética, ela se formou em modelagem e estudou figurinos e marketing, além de fazer uma dupla graduação em radiodifusão e jornalismo televisivo ao mesmo tempo.

Ainda em seu primeiro ano em 2010, ela disputou e venceu o campeonato no 35º Concurso Internacional Miss Bikini na China, bem como a segunda colocada no ranking do concurso Global. No mesmo ano, ela entrou oficialmente no showbiz com sua participação especial em 2011 'Journey to the West'.

趙茜，1992 年 6 月 9 日出生於內蒙古鄂爾多斯市，中國模特、演員 。

2010 年，獲得第 35 屆國際比基尼小姐大賽中國冠軍、全球亞軍、慈善小姐、秋季女郎。2013 年 8 月，在《變形金剛 4》全球華人演員海選中同來自全球的 7 萬多人角逐獲得參演該片機會。2014 年 6 月，與邁克爾·貝、李冰冰等一同亮相了《變形金剛 4：絕跡重生》的全球首映禮，上海、香港和北京首映禮。同年參演克里斯·韋奇執導的好萊塢電影《魔獸戰車》。

2017 年 4 月，在時尚懸疑偶像劇《歸還世界給你》中飾演胡雯汐。11 月，受邀出席“2017 亞洲音樂盛典”，並擔任主持。同年，在懸疑劇《暗黑者 3》中飾演陸飄飄 。2018 年 6 月，參演現實題材電視劇《風暴舞》。8 月，出演王凱執導的電影《特勤精英》。9 月，憑藉電影《SIJI:DRIVER》獲得蒙特利爾國際花環獎電影節“最佳女主角獎” 。

data.biography:
吴玉芳，演员，毕业于北京电影学院。她的戏路较宽，勇于尝试不同环境不同性格的女性角色。她饰演的与自身有极大反差的陕北农村姑娘刘巧珍，已成为中国电影女性画廊中的经典形象。她的表演注重对人物内在气质的揭示。

　　1984年吴玉芳出演吴天明执导的电影《人生》，饰演女主角刘巧珍，片中的她表演质朴准确，细腻深沉，让她获得了第八届《大众电影》百花奖最佳女演员奖项。1988年与兵乓球运动员江嘉良结婚之后淡出娱乐圈出国深造，1997年做回自由演员，陆续在各类电影、电视剧作品中出演。2019年11月，吴玉芳凭借《送我上青云》中梁美枝一角获得第32届金鸡奖最佳女配角。

　　代表作品有电影《人生》、《冰山下的来客》、《送我上青云》，电视剧《涉外保姆》、《蜗居》、《幸福相依》等。
data.name: 吴玉芳

data.biography: Wu Yufang, nasceu em Xangai, é graduada pela Academia de Cinema de Pequim, é uma atriz da China Continental. Em 1984, Wu Yufang ganhou o prêmio de Melhor Atriz no Oitavo Prêmio de Filme Popular Cem Flores por seu papel no filme "Life". Mais tarde, ele participou de muitos trabalhos de cinema e televisão, como "Woman's Sky", "Snail House", "Crane Huating" e "An Jia".

吳玉芳，演員，畢業於北京電影學院。她的戲路較寬，勇於嘗試不同環境不同性格的女性角色。她飾演的與自身有極大反差的陝北農村姑娘劉巧珍，已成為中國電影女性畫廊中的經典形象。她的表演注重對人物內在氣質的揭示。

1984 年吳玉芳出演吳天明執導的電影《人生》，飾演女主角劉巧珍，片中的她表演質樸準確，細膩深沉，讓她獲得了第八屆《大眾電影》百花獎最佳女演員獎項。1988 年與兵乓球運動員江嘉良結婚之後淡出娛樂圈出國深造，1997 年做回自由演員，陸續在各類電影、電視劇作品中出演。2019 年 11 月，吳玉芳憑藉《送我上青雲》中梁美枝一角獲得第 32 屆金雞獎最佳女配角。

代表作品有電影《人生》、《冰山下的來客》、《送我上青雲》，電視劇《涉外保姆》、《蝸居》、《幸福相依》等。
data.name: 吳玉芳

data.biography:
Shin Ha-kyun (신하균) is a South Korean actor. Born on May 30 1974, he first trained as a stage actor at the Seoul Institute of the Arts, before transitioning to film and gaining national fame with his role as a North Korean soldier in Joint Security Area (JSA, 2000). The film was a major blockbuster with 5 million admissions domestically. And it earned him the prestigious Blue Dragon Best Supporting Actor award.

After the success of JSA, Shin has appeared in many critically and popularly acclaimed roles, including in Guns & Talks (2001), Sympathy for Mr. Vengeance (2002), and Save the Green Planet! (2003). He then starred in Welcome to Dongmakgol (2005) in the lead role, which was another major blockbuster with 8 million admissions domestically. Recently, he appeared in The Thieves (2012) and Extreme Job (2019), which were the 2nd biggest hits in Korean film history at their respective time of release, with 12 million and 16 million admissions respectively.
data.name: Shin Ha-kyun

Martin Semmelrogge (born 8 December 1955, Boll-Eckwälden, Bad Boll, Germany) is a German actor, best known for his role as the comical 2WO (1st Lieutenant/Second Watch Officer) in the film Das Boot. He is the brother of former actor Joachim Bernhard, who appeared in Das Boot as the religious sailor.

Like many of his Das Boot co-stars, Semmelrogge went on to have a successful career in the German cinema.

Jonathan Scott Frakes (born August 19, 1952) is an American actor and director. He is best known for his portrayal of Commander (later Captain) William T. Riker in the television series Star Trek: The Next Generation and subsequent films and series. He has also hosted the series Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction, voiced David Xanatos in the Disney animated series Gargoyles, and narrated the History Channel documentary, Lee and Grant.

His other well known TV roles are as Stanley Hazard on the miniseries North and South, Sandy Parris on ABC's Paper Dolls, Marcus Marshall on NBC's Bare Essence, and Damon Ross, a recurring character on Falcon Crest.

He began directing episodes of The Next Generation during its third season, and went on to direct the feature films Star Trek: First Contact (1996) and Star Trek: Insurrection (1998) and episodes of the later Star Trek series Deep Space Nine, Voyager, Discovery, Strange New Worlds, and Picard. He later directed the feature films Clockstoppers (2002) and Thunderbirds (2004). He has since directed prolifically for television, including for The Librarian television films and series, Leverage, Burn Notice, and Roswell (of which he is also a producer).

He is the credited author of the novel The Abductors: Conspiracy, which was ghostwritten by Dean Wesley Smith.

He has been married to actress Genie Francis since 1988 and they have 2 children.
data.name: Jonathan Frakes

data.biography:
Jonathan Frakes (* 19. August 1952 in Bellefonte, Pennsylvania) ist ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler, Regisseur und Fernsehmoderator. Bekannt wurde er vor allem durch seine Rolle als Commander William T. Riker in der US-amerikanischen Fernsehserie Raumschiff Enterprise: Das nächste Jahrhundert und seine Moderation der Mystery-Fernsehserie X-Factor: Das Unfassbare.

Auf dem Fernsehbildschirm erschien er zum ersten Mal in der Fernsehserie The Doctors, in der er die Rolle des Tom Carroll spielte. Anschließend zog es ihn nach Los Angeles, wo weitere Serien- und Theaterauftritte folgten. Einen gewissen Bekanntheitsgrad erlangte er erstmals durch seine Darstellung des Stanley Hazard in dem TV-Mehrteiler Fackeln im Sturm. Bei den Dreharbeiten lernte er seine spätere Frau Genie Francis kennen.

Nach der zweiten Staffel von Fackeln im Sturm erhielt er im Jahr 1987 die Rolle des ersten Offiziers William Riker in der Fernsehserie Raumschiff Enterprise: Das nächste Jahrhundert, den er in 176 Episoden und vier Kinofilmen verkörperte. Bei der Episode „Datas Nachkomme“ führte Jonathan Frakes erstmals Regie. Nach weiteren Folgen dieser Serie übernahm er den Regie-Stuhl in verschiedenen Star-Trek-Episoden von Deep Space Nine und Voyager. Als die Enterprise-Crew um Captain Picard auf die Kinoleinwand wechselte, arbeitete er bei den Star-Trek-Filmen Star Trek: Der erste Kontakt (1996) und Star Trek: Der Aufstand (1998) sowohl als Schauspieler als auch als Regisseur. Frakes ist der einzige Schauspieler, der in vier verschiedenen Star Trek-Serien auftrat, und bei ebenso vielen auch als Regisseur tätig war.

Wegen seiner effizienten Regieführung in Star Trek: Der Erste Kontakt erhielt er den Spitznamen „Two-Takes Frakes“. Neben verschiedenen Folgen anderer Serien (Roswell) dreht er 2002 den Kinofilm Clockstoppers und 2004 die Realverfilmung des Supermarionation-Klassikers Thunderbirds, die beide aber wenig erfolgreich waren. Von 1994 bis 1997 synchronisierte er in der Disney-Zeichentrickserie Gargoyles – Auf den Schwingen der Gerechtigkeit den Bösewicht David Xanatos. Seit 2006 ist er als Regisseur in erster Linie für das Fernsehen tätig.

Von 1998 bis 2002 war Jonathan Frakes als Moderator der Mystery-Serie X-Factor: Das Unfassbare zu sehen, in der er mysteriöse Geschichten präsentierte, die entweder auf vorgeblich wahren Begebenheiten beruhten oder frei erfunden waren.

Quelle: Wikipedia

Jonathan Frakes est un acteur, réalisateur et producteur américain né le 19 août 1952 à Bethlehem en Pennsylvanie aux États-Unis. Il est surtout connu pour avoir tenu le rôle de William T. Riker notamment dans la série Star Trek : La Nouvelle Génération et dans les films qui en sont adaptés.

Aideen is an actor and playwright. She is also a PhD candidate in the Department of Drama & Theatre Studies at Mary Immaculate College, UL.

She trained at the DIT Conservatory of Music & Drama, and holds a MA in Drama and Theatre Studies from UCC.

She is a member of BrokenCrow, a multidisciplinary ensemble collaborating on new work. Her first play, Levin & Levin, debuted at the Dublin Fringe Festival 2017. The play tells the story of Ida and Bubbie Levin, escapees from the Russian pogroms, who become Weimar's most famous male impersonators.

Aideen was also co-creator and performer of the smash-hit play Love All in 2012.

Aideen participated in The Next Stage, the artist development strand of the annual Dublin Theatre Festival, in 2016 and holds a certificate in Holocaust Education at TCD.

data.biography:
Joshua Mathias O'Connor (born May 20, 1990) is a British actor. After training at the Bristol Old Vic Theatre School, he had supporting roles in television series such as Doctor Who in 2013 and Peaky Blinders in 2014. He had his breakthrough playing the lead role of a sheep farmer in Francis Lee's romantic drama God's Own Country (2017), for which he won a British Independent Film Award.

For portraying a young Charles III in the Netflix drama series The Crown (2019–2020), O'Connor won a Primetime Emmy Award and a Golden Globe Award. He has since starred in the period dramas Emma (2020) and La Chimera (2023) as well as Luca Guadagnino's Challengers (2024) and Rian Johnson's Wake Up Dead Man (2025).
data.name: Josh O'Connor

data.biography:
Josh O'Connor, 20 Mayıs 1990 tarihinde Southampton, İngiltere'de dünyaya gelmiştir. Sanatla iç içe bir ailede, heykeltıraş bir dedenin torunu olarak Cheltenham'da büyüyen O'Connor, oyunculuk eğitimini prestijli Bristol Old Vic Tiyatro Okulu'nda tamamladı ve 2011 yılında mezun oldu. Profesyonel kariyerine televizyonda "Lewis", "Doctor Who" ve "Peaky Blinders" gibi popüler yapımlarda aldığı konuk oyuncu rolleriyle adım attı. Sinemadaki ilk kayda değer deneyimlerinden birini ise "The Riot Club" (2014) filmiyle yaşadı.

Onu ilk kez geniş bir izleyici kitlesiyle buluşturan ve yeteneğini kanıtlamasını sağlayan proje, ünlü yazar Gerald Durrell'ın otobiyografik eserlerinden uyarlanan "The Durrells" (2016-2019) dizisindeki yazar Lawrence Durrell rolü oldu. Ancak O'Connor'ın kariyerindeki asıl büyük kırılma noktası ve onu bağımsız sinemanın aranan yüzlerinden biri yapan yapım, Francis Lee'nin yönettiği "God's Own Country" (2017) filmiydi. Bu filmde canlandırdığı, duygusal olarak içine kapanık ve zorlu bir hayat süren çiftçi Johnny Saxby karakteri, eleştirmenlerden tam not aldı ve ona En İyi Erkek Oyuncu dalında İngiliz Bağımsız Film Ödülü'nü (BIFA) kazandırdı. Bu başarı, onun derinlikli ve karmaşık karakterleri canlandırma konusundaki ustalığını gözler önüne serdi.

Josh O'Connor'ı küresel bir yıldız statüsüne taşıyan ve ana akım medyada büyük yankı uyandıran rolü ise Netflix'in fenomen dizisi "The Crown" oldu. Dizinin 3. ve 4. sezonlarında (2019-2020) Galler Prensi Charles karakterine hayat veren aktör, karakterin yalnızlığını, kraliyet baskısı altındaki sıkışmışlığını ve Diana ile olan çalkantılı ilişkisini büyük bir hassasiyetle yansıttı. Bu unutulmaz performansı, kendisine Drama Dizisinde En İyi Erkek Oyuncu dalında Primetime Emmy Ödülü ve Altın Küre Ödülü kazandırdı.

"The Crown" sonrası dönemde kariyerini uluslararası projelerle zenginleştiren O'Connor, "Emma." (2020) filminde Mr. Elton ve "Mothering Sunday" (2021) filminde Paul Sheringham gibi karakterlerle dönem filmlerindeki başarısını sürdürdü. İtalyan yönetmen Alice Rohrwacher'in "La Chimera" (2023) filminde, kayıp aşkını arayan arkeolog Arthur karakteriyle başrolde yer alarak Cannes Film Festivali'nde övgü topladı. 2024 yılında ise Luca Guadagnino'nun yönettiği, tenis dünyasında geçen rekabet dolu romantik drama "Challengers" filminde Zendaya ve Mike Faist ile başrolü paylaşarak Patrick Zweig karakterini canlandırdı ve çok yönlü oyunculuğunu bir kez daha kanıtladı. Oyunculuğun yanı sıra sanatın diğer dallarıyla da yakından ilgilenen O'Connor, tutkulu bir seramik sanatçısı ve fotoğrafçıdır.

data.biography: Была призёром первого в СССР конкурса красоты "Московская красавица". Затем училась у известного театрального режиссёра Анатолия Васильева. В 1993 году окончила РАТИ (ГИТИС). Играла в двух антрепризных театральных постановках: "О мышах и людях" с Дмитрием Харатьяном и у Татьяны Догилевой в спектакле "Лунный свет, медовый месяц" и спектакле "Свадебное путешествие" по пьесе В. Сорокина в постановке Э. Боякова. В кино начала сниматься ещё с 1979 года - первой ролью была эпизодическая роль школьницы в популярном детском фильме "Приключения Электроника". Но настоящим дебютом в кино можно считать роль в детективе "Утреннее шоссе" в 1988 году. Особо стоит отметить работы Оксаны Фандеры в лентах Александра Хвана. Но самые лучшие свои роли Оксана сыграла в фильмах своего мужа Филиппа Янковского - "В движении", "Статский советник" и "Каменная башка".
data.name: Оксана Фандера

data.biography:
In her early days Liu worked as a farm labourer, then as a propagandist for the People's Liberation Army and later a stage actor for the Chengdu Military Drama Group.

Liu acted in mainland Chinese films before she turned 30 — The Great Wall of the South China Sea (1976), What a Family (1979) and The Little Flower (1980). Her breakthrough role was the ruthless Qing Dynasty Empress Dowager Cixi in The Burning of the Imperial Palace (1983) and Reign Behind the Curtain (1984). Her portrayal of Cixi won her numerous awards in Chinese film festivals and she later reprised the role in two unrelated films, including Li Lianying: The Imperial Eunuch (1991). She won Best Actress at the Hundred Flowers Award for her role as Hua Jinzhi in The Savage Land, filmed in 1981 but not released until 1987, and again for her role in Hibiscus Town (1986). She holds a record for having won the most number of awards in the actress categories of the Hundred Flowers Award, with three Best Actress and one Best Supporting Actress.

Liu left the entertainment industry in the 1990s to focus on business, but later returned to acting in the mid 2000s. One of her latest films was Chunhua (also titled Plastic Flower, released in 2004), in which she played the titular role, Chunhua. She performed in a stage play, The Last Night of Tapan Chin, in China and Taiwan from 2005 to 2008.

Liu published a short autobiography I Did It My Way in 1983. She became one of the richest people in China, appearing at 45 on Forbes' list of the 50 richest Chinese businessmen and businesswomen in 1999. She promoted her success by publishing a book titled From A Movie Star to A Billionaire. She was arrested for tax evasion in connection with her company, Beijing Xiaoqing Culture and Arts Company Ltd., in 2002, was fined 7.1 million yuan, and imprisoned for a year.

In 2012 Liu Xiaoqing played Sai Jinhua in a performance of the play The Beauty.
data.name: Liu Xiaoqing

data.biography: Liu Xiaoqing é uma atriz e empresária chinesa. Ela foi uma das principais atrizes na China na década de 1980.

刘晓庆，著名演员，国家一级演员。中华人民共和国第七届全国政治协商委员会委员，中华人民共和国全国青年联合会委员，中国作家协会会员、中国全国表演学会副会长、天津人民艺术剧院艺术顾问。与北京电影制片厂的张金玲、李秀明一起，并称为“北影三朵金花”，红遍全国。她们主演的一系列电影作品，影响了无数中国电影观众。

1975年，刘晓庆第一次试镜，拍摄“文革”后期的电影《南海长城》，先后拿过五次百花奖、一次金鸡奖。有人评价说，1980年代的中国电影属于“刘晓庆时代”。她生长于知识分子家庭，自幼爱好音乐。1963年考入四川音乐学院附中，学习扬琴和钢琴，70年附中毕业后分配到宣汉县农场。1972年被宣汉县宣传队选取中，不久被借调襄渝铁路宣传队演出。年底，成都军区文工团调她演出歌剧《杜鹃山》。73年被八一电影制片厂选中，担任《南海长城》女主角，从此跃上银幕。以《小花》崭露头角，1975年，刘晓庆第一次“触电”，到了1980年，她已是北京电影制片厂的一位知名电影演员了。她因出演《瞧这一家子》而获得了第三届大众电影百花奖最佳配角奖。1987年，在《芙蓉镇》里，刘晓庆因成功饰演了胡玉音而获第七届中国电影金鸡奖最佳女主角奖。1988年，在《火凤凰》里，刘晓庆获第十一届电影百花奖最佳女演员奖。在著名电视剧《武则天》里，刘晓庆从16岁一直演到83岁，丝毫看不出她当时已年近半百。刘晓庆名言：“做人难，做女人难，做名女人更难，做单身的名女人难乎其难”。1990年，影后刘晓庆正式“下海”经商，10年经商成就演艺圈女老板。1990年代，刘晓庆的注意力转移到了电影外的世界，投资房地产、拍摄电视剧、拍卖书稿等，成为“中国的亿万富姐”。美国《福布斯》杂志公布，中国富豪名列第45位的刘晓庆有7000万至9000万美元的身价。
data.name: 刘晓庆

data.biography:
劉曉慶，著名演員，國家一級演員。中華人民共和國第七屆全國政治協商委員會委員，中華人民共和國全國青年聯合會委員，中國作家協會會員、中國全國表演學會副會長、天津人民藝術劇院藝術顧問。與北京電影製片廠的張金玲、李秀明一起，並稱為“北影三朵金花”，紅遍全國。她們主演的一系列電影作品，影響了無數中國電影觀眾。

1975 年，劉曉慶第一次試鏡，拍攝“文革”後期的電影《南海長城》，先後拿過五次百花獎、一次金雞獎。有人評價説，1980 年代的中國電影屬於“劉曉慶時代”。她生長於知識分子家庭，自幼愛好音樂。1963 年考入四川音樂學院附中，學習揚琴和鋼琴，70 年附中畢業後分配到宣漢縣農場。1972 年被宣漢縣宣傳隊選取中，不久被借調襄渝鐵路宣傳隊演出。年底，成都軍區文工團調她演出歌劇《杜鵑山》。73 年被八一電影製片廠選中，擔任《南海長城》女主角，從此躍上銀幕。以《小花》嶄露頭角，1975 年，劉曉慶第一次“觸電”，到了 1980 年，她已是北京電影製片廠的一位知名電影演員了。她因出演《瞧這一家子》而獲得了第三屆大眾電影百花獎最佳配角獎。1987 年，在《芙蓉鎮》裏，劉曉慶因成功飾演了胡玉音而獲第七屆中國電影金雞獎最佳女主角獎。1988 年，在《火鳳凰》裏，劉曉慶獲第十一屆電影百花獎最佳女演員獎。在著名電視劇《武則天》裏，劉曉慶從 16 歲一直演到 83 歲，絲毫看不出她當時已年近半百。劉曉慶名言：“做人難，做女人難，做名女人更難，做單身的名女人難乎其難”。1990 年，影後劉曉慶正式“下海”經商，10 年經商成就演藝圈女老闆。1990 年代，劉曉慶的注意力轉移到了電影外的世界，投資房地產、拍攝電視劇、拍賣書稿等，成為“中國的億萬富姐”。美國《福布斯》雜誌公佈，中國富豪名列第 45 位的劉曉慶有 7000 萬至 9000 萬美元的身價。
data.name: 劉曉慶

Jeremy Boring (born October 28, 1969), known professionally as Jeremy Davies, is an American film and television actor. He is known for playing Ray Aibelli in Spanking the Monkey (1994), Corporal Timothy Upham in Saving Private Ryan (1998), Snow in Solaris (2002), Bill Henson in Dogville (2003), Charles Manson in Helter Skelter (2004), Sergeant Gene DeBruin in Rescue Dawn (2006) and Daniel Faraday on the series Lost (2008–2010).

Davies won an Emmy Award for Outstanding Guest Actor in a Drama Series in 2012 for his portrayal of Dickie Bennett in the series Justified (2011–2015). He also received the BAFTA Award for Best Performance in a Video Game for his role as Baldur in God of War (2018).

Jay Olcutt Sanders (born April 16, 1953) is an American film, theatre and television actor and playwright. He frequently appears in plays off-Broadway at The Public Theatre. He has received a Drama Desk Award and a New York Drama Critics' Circle Award.

Sanders made his off-Broadway debut in a Shakespeare in the Park production of Henry V in 1976. He originated the role of Bradley in Sam Shepard's Buried Child (1978). He made his Broadway debut in the play Loose Ends (1979). He returned to Broadway in The Caine Mutiny Court-Martial (1983), Saint Joan (1993), Pygmalion (2007), Girl from the North Country (2020), and Purlie Victorious (2023).

He made his feature film debut in the comedy Starting Over (1979). He had notable roles in films such as Cross Creek (1983), Tucker: The Man and His Dream (1988), Glory (1989), JFK (1991), Hostages (1992), Angels in the Outfield (1994), Music of the Heart (1999), Tumbleweeds (1999), and Revolutionary Road (2008). He took recurring roles in television series including Law & Order: Criminal Intent, The Good Wife, Person of Interest, Blindspot, and Sneaky Pete. He has served as the narrator for the shows Wide Angle, Nova, and Secrets of the Dead.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Jay O. Sanders, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Jay O. Sanders

杰伊·奥尔卡特·桑德斯（Jay Olcutt Sanders，1953年4月16日-），美国演员。他因在《盲点》中扮演比尔·韦勒、在《追捕》中扮演杰克·布莱恩特、在《罪人》中扮演汤姆·利德尔酋长、在《寡妇》中扮演约翰·梅纳德、在《法律与秩序：犯罪意图》中扮演约瑟夫·汉纳上尉和在 NBC 侦探系列《犯罪故事》（1986-1988 年）中扮演黑帮律师史蒂文·科多而闻名，以及他在《后天》（2004 年）中的电影角色。 绿灯侠 （2011），以及摩根弗里曼主演的亚历克斯·克罗斯电影。

他还出演过许多其他著名电影，包括《荣耀》（1989）、《命运先生》（1990）、《肯尼迪》（1991）、《外场天使》（1994）、《大绿》（1995）、《日光》（1996）、《媒人》（1997）、《富人或穷人》（1997）、《风滚草》（1999）、《心灵音乐》（1999）、《半纳尔逊》（2006）、《凯迪拉克唱片》（2008）和《革命之路》（2008）。

2002 年至 2009 年，他还担任 PBS 系列广角的叙述者，并从 2007 年开始担任许多 Nova 剧集和纪录片特辑的叙述者。

他是《荒野大镖客：救赎》视频游戏系列中 DS McKenna 的配音。
data.name: 杰伊·桑德斯

data.biography:
Jay Olcutt Sanders (né le 16 avril 1953) est un acteur américain. Il est connu pour ses rôles à la télévision dans le rôle de Bill Weller dans Blindspot, Jack Bryant dans Manhunt, le chef Tom Lidell dans The Sinner, le détective John Maynard dans Widows, le capitaine Joseph Hannah dans Law & Order: Criminal Intent et l'avocat de la mafia Steven Kordo dans la série policière Crime Story de NBC (1986-1988), ainsi que pour ses rôles au cinéma dans The Day After Tomorrow (2004), Green Lantern (2011) et les films d'Alex Cross avec Morgan Freeman.

Il est apparu dans de nombreux autres films notables, notamment Glory (1989), Mr. Destiny (1990), JFK (1991), Angels in the Outfield (1994), The Big Green (1995), Daylight (1996), The Matchmaker (1997), For Richer or Poorer (1997), Tumbleweeds (1999), Music of the Heart (1999), Half Nelson (2006), Cadillac Records (2008) et Revolutionary Road (2008).

Il est également connu comme le narrateur de la série PBS Wide Angle de 2002 à 2009 et a servi de narrateur pour un certain nombre d'épisodes de Nova et d'émissions spéciales documentaires à partir de 2007.

Il est la voix de DS McKenna dans la série de jeux vidéo Red Dead Redemption.

data.name: เจย์ โอ แซนเดอร์ส

綠燈俠 （2011），以及摩根弗裏曼主演的亞歷克斯·克羅斯電影。

Chỉ có một thế lực duy nhất dám đứng lên chống lại thế giới tội phạm này, đó chính là "Hội Thẩm Phán". Họ là những cảnh sát kỳ cựu được trao quyền tự quyết định và tự hành xử. Trong đó, Dredd (Karl Urban thủ vai) là thẩm phán tối cao, và là cái tên mà băng đảng phải khiếp sợ mỗi khi nhắc đến.Trong thế giới tội phạm, tú bà Ma-Ma (Lena Headey đóng) vừa là trùm xã hội đen vừa là đầu nậu cung cấp ma túy mới, gây ảo giác "chậm" mà giới trẻ đang nghiện. Dredd cùng với lính mới Caassandra Anderson (Olivia Thrilby thủ vai), sẽ dấn thân vào những khu ổ chuột, đương đầu với các băng đảng xã hội đen và tham gia cuộc chiến bất tận ...

He is branded as the Taishu Engeki-kai Purinsu (大衆演劇界プリンス, Taishu Engeki's Prince) with the alias "Taishū engeki-kai no Nyūhīrō Tensai Onnagata" (大衆演劇界のニューヒーロー 天才女形, Taishū engeki's New Hero Genius Onnagata) and best remembered as Osei in Takeshi Kitano’s Zatoichi: The Blind Swordsman (2003). He is one of the taishū engeki stars to have become a professional enka recording artist.

data.biography:
Tiết Cương tên khai sinh là Mai Ngọc Cương.

Năm 1993, Tiết Cương lên Sài Gòn theo học Đại học Giao thông vận tải khoa hàng hải, nhưng anh bất ngờ rẽ hướng sang nghệ thuật. Khi ấy, Tiết Cương trọ ở gần trường sân khấu. Thời điểm đó sân khấu kịch phát triển mạnh, chương trình "Trong nhà ngoài phố" khiến khán giả màn ảnh nhỏ say mê, diễn viên kịch được yêu mến và quý trọng. Bao nhiêu người muốn ngắm diễn viên ở ngoài đời. Tiết Cương chỉ cần ló cổ ra khỏi nhà trọ dòm qua trường là thấy được họ. Nào là Hữu Châu, Minh Nhí, Hữu Nghĩa, Hồng Vân, Hồng Đào. Rồi từ đó Tiết Cương say mê và tìm tòi nghệ thật, học được khoảng hai năm rưỡi bên trường Giao thông vận tải, anh quyết định thi vô sân khấu. Đó là lần đỗ thứ hai. Nhưng tiếc nuối và buồn nhất của cuộc đời Tiết Cương là chưa kịp báo cho ba hay thành quả của cái quyết định đột ngột ấy thì ba của anh đột ngột qua đời sau một vụ tai nạn.

Anh theo học ở trường Nghệ thuật Sân khấu II (nay là trường Đại học Sân khấu Điện Ảnh) khoa diễn xuất cùng lớp với Thuý Nga, Việt Hương, Cao Minh Đạt, Hạnh Thuý... Trước đó, anh học dự thính một năm tại trường cùng với Việt Hương do thầy Công Ninh chủ nhiệm.

Năm 2003, Anh tốt nghiệp muộn chuyên ngành diễn viên. Anh nổi tiếng cùng thời với Thái Hòa, Đức Thịnh...

Ngoài vai trò diễn xuất, Tiết Cương còn là MC và đạo diễn cho các vở kịch, tiểu phẩm truyền hình.
data.name: Tiết Cương

data.overview: Trạng sư Tống Sỹ Kiệt, do miệng lưỡi giảo hoạt, có thể biến trắng thành đen, bẻ cong sự thật nên được nhờ vả nhiều. Song vì nghiệp chướng quá lớn nên con trai cứ sinh ra là chết yểu. Sau cái chết của đứa con thứ 13, Sỹ Kiệt quyết tâm gác bút, từ bỏ nghiệp trạng sư. Cả gia đình ông mở hàng trà quán ở ngoại thành sống cuộc sống mới. Tuy vậy, khi một quả phụ bụng mang dạ chửa tới nhờ Tống Sỹ Kiệt giúp mình minh oan vụ án mạng của gia đình, ông lại phải tái xuất công đường. Vấp phải hệ thống công quyền thối nát, sẵn sàng dùng đủ thủ đoạn để lấp liếm sự thật, Tống Sỹ Kiệt phải trổ hết tài năng để một lần giành được công lý đích thực!

Stacy Edwards (born March 4, 1965) is an American actress. Edwards was born in Glasgow, Montana, the daughter of Patty and Preston Edwards, who was an Air Force officer. She grew up all over the world, from Guam to Alabama. At 18, she received a scholarship to the Lou Conte Dance Studio in Chicago and began her performance career as a dancer and actress. She portrayed Hayley Benson on NBC daytime drama Santa Barbara from 1986 to 1988. She also had a role on the main cast of the medical drama Chicago Hope as Dr. Lisa Catera for 2 seasons from 1997 to 1999. Stacy Edwards's latest role is on tonight's episode of The Mentalist (CBS). First aired September 30, 2010.

Edwards has been married to Eddie Bowz since 1996. Bowz is also an actor; they met when working together on the movie The Fear.

​From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Brian Backer (born December 5, 1956) is an American actor who has starred in film and on television. He is best known for his role in the 1982 hit comedy film Fast Times at Ridgemont High as shy teenager Mark "Rat" Ratner. His other films include the 1985 comedy film Moving Violations (playing the role of Scott Greeber) and the 1987 comedy film Police Academy 4: Citizens on Patrol.

Backer's primary television role was on the soap opera Santa Barbara in 1990 as A. Bartlett Congdon. He has made guest appearances on such shows as Charles in Charge and Growing Pains.

Backer won the 1981 Tony Award for Best Performance by a Featured Actor in a Play, the Drama Desk Award for Outstanding Featured Actor in a Play, and the Theatre World Award for Woody Allen's The Floating Light Bulb, in which he portrayed an Allen-like protagonist.

data.biography: Bernard Sanders (born September 8, 1941) is an American politician and activist serving as the senior United States senator from Vermont, a seat he has held since 2007. He was the U.S. representative for the state's at-large congressional district from 1991 to 2007. Sanders is the longest serving independent in U.S. congressional history. He has a close relationship with the Democratic Party, having caucused with House and Senate Democrats for most of his congressional career and emerging as a key ally of President Joe Biden. A self-described democratic socialist, he is often seen as a leader of the progressive movement in the United States. Sanders unsuccessfully sought the Democratic Party nomination for president of the United States in 2016 and 2020, finishing in second place in both campaigns. Before his election to Congress, he was mayor of Burlington, Vermont.
data.name: Bernie Sanders

data.biography:
Joyful Drake, the much-loved Tasha on the iconic BET comedy series “Let’s Stay Together” is on the scene in a big way. In addition to a recurring role in Starz’s “P-Valley,” she also leads the eight-episode upcoming drama series “HUSH” for streamer ALLBLK. Creator Angela Burd Murray describes the series as, “a sexy drama about four dynamic women who will stop at nothing to get what they want.”

Drake starred opposite DJ Qualls in November Rule, opposite Ryan Phillippe in Catch Hell and was Sean “P. Diddy” Combs’ girlfriend in Judd Apatow’s Get Him to the Greek. Other notable film roles include Beauty Shop with Queen Latifah, Phat Girlz with Mo’Nique and she starred as a woman trying to escape an abusive relationship in the independent drama feature Bad Ass opposite Danny Trejo and Ving Rhames. Drake has also guest starred in television episodes of “Jane the Virgin,” “One on One,” “Cuts,” “The Game,” “The Exes” and “The Quads.”

Born and raised in Milwaukee and a graduate of the University of Wisconsin, Drake is also a proud member of Alpha Kappa Alpha sorority. While in college, she experienced her first brush with the entertainment industry. For two and-a-half years she had an exciting time as a dancer for the NBA Milwaukee Bucks. She remains an avid fan and also loves the NFL’s Green Bay Packers. After graduation, she moved to New York to pursue an acting career. Her first job was a recurring role on the hit Showtime series “Soul Food.”

Drake makes her home in Los Angeles with her husband and daughter Beau.
data.name: Joyful Drake

data.biography:
Ito Kentarō, formerly known only by his given name, "Kentaro", is a Japanese actor and model. He was born in Tokyo and began his early career as a model in 2012 at age 14. In 2014, he joined Bonn Image, a modeling agency, at first for advertising jobs.

Then, he landed a supporting role in the highly rated nighttime drama "Hirugao: Heijitsu Gogo 3 Ji no Koibito Tachi". He's acting as a young high school student garnered attention, and in 2015, he appeared for the first time on the big screen with the movie "My Story!" and was well-regarded for his TV drama roles that year and through 2016, notably in "Gakko no Kaidan and Aogeba Toutoshi". He won his first leading roles in 2017 with the movie "Demekin" as a leader of a motorcycle gang and later, in the romantic time-travel TV comedy-drama "Ashi Girl", as the young Warring States era samurai lord Tadakiyo Kuhachiro Hagi.

In 2018, he landed many more film and TV roles. On his 21st birthday, he announced a change from his stage name "Kentaro" to his full birth name, Ito Kentaro. He is also known by his fans as "Icchan" (いっちゃん). Currently, he is managed by the agency Aoao.

Ito's car crashed into a motorcycle while driving in Shibuya Ward on the evening of October 28, 2020. Both the driver and the passenger of the motorcycle, a 26-year-old man and a 27-year-old woman, were transported to the nearest hospital. The woman suffered serious injuries including a broken leg, while the man had a bruised arm and a sprained neck.

He was arrested for an alleged hit-and-run accident. The prosecutors suspended the investigation in March of 2021 after a settlement was reached with the two victims, and the prosecutors could not find enough evidence to prove intent since Ito had returned to the scene at the insistence of a witness after driving a bit over a hundred meters.
data.name: Kentaro Ito

松冈茉优（MAYU MATSUOKA），1995年2月16日出生于东京都，日本影视女演员，隶属于Hirata演艺事务所。

2004年，松冈茉优因被演艺公司看中而进入艺能界。

2007年，松冈茉优凭借校园剧《考试之神》正式出道。

2008年，松冈茉优开始担任儿童节目《Oha Suta》常规成员。

2010年，松冈茉优出演了《桂千鹤诊察日记》。

2013年，松冈茉优凭借晨间剧《海女》而被更多的观众所认识  。

2014年，松冈茉优被日经娱乐月刊评选为最受瞩目的六位次世代女演员之一。

2015年，松冈茉优因出演社会话题剧《问题餐厅》而受到更多关注；同年，她还出演了悬疑剧《She》。

2017年，她出演了都市剧《我丈夫不擅长工作》。

2018年，松冈茉优凭借爱情片《不想恋爱》获得第27届日本电影职业大奖最佳女主角奖。

2019年1月，凭借在《小偷家族》、《花牌情缘：结》等影片获得第61届蓝丝带奖最佳女配角奖。
data.name: 松冈茉优

2015 年，松岡茉優因出演社會話題劇《問題餐廳》而受到更多關注；同年，她還出演了懸疑劇《She》。
